metadata.description: A2R team agent skills for Claude Code and Cowork

plugins.name: a2r-brand-design-system
plugins.description: A2R brand design system: color palettes, typography, logo usage, UI component specs, design tokens, and light/dark theming for any A2R visual or UI work.

plugins.name: a2r-brand-voice
plugins.description: A2R brand voice and writing style guide (English and Spanish): tone rules, personality pillars, CTA patterns, and voice compliance checks for any customer-facing copy.

plugins.name: a2r-discord-threads
plugins.description: Extrae los hilos de los foros de asistencia del Discord de A2R en un rango de fechas y los devuelve como tabla Cliente | Titulo | Etiqueta | URL.

plugins.name: a2r-docx-template
plugins.description: Convierte Markdown en un documento Word (.docx) con la plantilla corporativa de A2R: portada, indice automatico, cuerpo maquetado y contraportada.

plugins.name: codex-computer-use
plugins.description: Delegate local app verification that needs computer use (browser automation, simulators, screenshots, app launching) to Codex CLI (gpt-5.6).

plugins.name: codex-implementation
plugins.description: Delegate scoped code changes in the current repository to Codex CLI (gpt-5.6), then inspect the resulting diff and verification.

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Get an independent code review of uncommitted changes, a branch diff, a commit, or a specific implementation from Codex CLI (gpt-5.6).

plugins.name: senior-code-reviewer
plugins.description: Staff/Principal-level code review of PRs, diffs, and changesets for correctness, security, performance, and design.
